name: French-Fried Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the scallops and pat them very dry with paper towels.
2. Pour the oil-free Italian dressing into a shallow bowl.
3. In a pie plate, combine the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, and paprika.
4. Dip each scallop in the dressing, then roll it in the crumb mixture to coat well.
5. Arrange the coated scallops in a circle on a microwave-safe plate.
6. Microwave at 100% power (HIGH) for 2 minutes.
7. Rearrange the scallops, moving the outer pieces to the center of the dish.
8. Microwave at 100% power (HIGH) for an additional 1 to 2 minutes, or just until the scallops are firm when tested with a knife.
9. Garnish with lemon wedges and parsley sprigs.
YIELD: 4 servings (152 calories per serving) Carb 9.7 g/ Protein 19 g/ Fat 3.5
